steps.title: Complete the first-to phrase
steps.content: After the first, the sentence needs an infinitive phrase showing what Parker's finding was the first evidence to do. The phrase should mean that the discovery placed humans in North America as far back as 10,000 years ago.

steps.title: Reject finite verb forms
steps.content: Choice A is a present-tense verb that cannot modify the first. Choice B creates the illogical phrase first placed humans. Choice C is also not the needed infinitive modifier. The answer is D.
